name: Pasta with Uncooked Fresh Tomatoes Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: seeded, and cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, stir together the tomatoes, olive oil, lemon juice, basil, and parsley.
2. Season to taste with white pepper.
3. Let the mixture sit at room temperature, uncovered, for 20 to 30 minutes.
4. Toss with cooked pasta the moment the pasta has been drained.
